finding_results.notes: Roughened six Yusuf dialogue lines across the diagnosis exchange. Line 129: broke 'Total sensory dropout. Motor output never stopped.' into interrupted data-checking with colloquial synthesis ('So everything, basically. All at once.'). Line 133: replaced three-fragment clinical summary with more personal, spoken delivery ('Your grafts just kept going. Didn't need you there for that.'). Line 149: broke the three-item anaphoric list ('Same X. Same Y. Same Z.') into a discovery sequence with interrupted trailing thought and colloquial confirmation ('Yeah, that too.'). Line 153: removed the thesis-framing 'confirmed part'/'unconfirmed part' binary, replaced with blunt opening ('It's spreading.') and trailing uncertainty with afterthought fragments ('Timing noise.'). Line 159: broke the polished firmware-exploit diagnosis with an explicit restart ('that's—' / stop / start again), added Birmingham-register 'proper', and left the tricolon trailing rather than completing it. Line 167: replaced the composed 'I know what I have to do first' with a false start and colloquial redirect ('We need to—look, nobody trains.'). All technical content preserved. Professional-to-cracking arc maintained across the exchange.

Recast the blackout and aftermath negatives into complete sentences while keeping the pressure compressed and physical. Also normalized the same clipped-negative habit in Yusuf's diagnosis line so the chapter no longer leans on 'Not X' / 'No Y' shorthand at pressure beats.

Removed the repeated computing-language drift from Kai's running and blackout experience, replacing it with body-first phrasing rooted in balance, muscle, stride, and injury. Literal bridge terminology remains only where it names actual implant behavior rather than turning Kai into a machine metaphor.

pass_summaries.summary: Regrounded the blackout and crash in Kai's embodied close third, made Yusuf's diagnosis legible through shared-server handshake evidence and explicit certainty tiers, replaced the ending's thematic restatement with an immediate fear response, and removed the chapter's em-dash and 'something' overuse.

Single finding addressed: Yusuf's virus diagnosis dialogue was delivered in polished thesis-speech packets. Revised six lines to introduce live-thinking pressure markers—interrupted data reads, abandoned classifications, explicit restarts, colloquial spill ('proper', 'Yeah, that too', 'look'), and afterthought fragments—while preserving the technical content and the professional-mode-cracking arc. No three-item summary or thesis sentence remains in any single line. All must-land beats, continuity details, and chapter structure preserved. Changes confined to Yusuf's dialogue and immediately adjacent narration beats in lines 129–167.

Revised the blackout/crash sequence and medical follow-through to eliminate clipped negative shorthand and reduce repeated computer-metaphor language, preserving the chapter's bodily horror, injury specificity, and virus reveal.
